nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Widespread frost after 5am. Clear. Low around 30, with temperatures rising to around 32 overnight. West northwest wind around 9 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Widespread frost before 9am. Sunny, with a high near 64. West northwest wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 35, with temperatures rising to around 38 overnight. North northwest wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 10am, then a chance of snow showers between 10am and 11am, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 48. North wind around 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 7pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Cloudy, with a low around 28. East northeast wind around 12 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow showers before 1pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Cloudy, with a high near 49. East southeast wind 13 to 20 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New snow accumulation of less than one inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 7pm, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. South southeast wind around 18 mph, with gusts as high as 28 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 1pm, then a chance of rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 71. South southwest wind 17 to 23 mph, with gusts as high as 31 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain and a slight chance of thunderstorms before 7pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Northwest wind 3 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers. Partly sunny, with a high near 60. North northeast wind around 8 mph, with gusts as high as 16 mph.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Northeast wind around 7 mph.

nws.name: Friday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 59. East northeast wind around 9 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 43. East northeast wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 16 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 63. East southeast wind 8 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.
